issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Create HTTP health-check monitor via API
scenarios.rationale: Treatment posts to https://api.uptimerobot.com/v2/newMonitor with type:1 (HTTP), interval:300 seconds, friendly_name, and alert_contacts in the dashed format; baseline guesses endpoint structure and omits the numeric type/interval encoding.

scenarios.name: List monitors with response times and decode status codes
scenarios.rationale: Treatment calls /v2/getMonitors with response_times:1 and response_times_limit:24, and decodes status values 0/1/2/8/9 (paused/not-checked/up/seems-down/down); baseline omits the response_times flags and the numeric status mapping.
